text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The real paper exists in *Radiology* 2020 with the title "Automated Abdominal CT Imaging Biomarkers for Opportunistic Prediction of Future Major Osteoporotic Fractures in Asymptomatic Adults," authored by Pickhardt, Graffy, Zea, Lee, Liu, Sandfort, and Summers — not Pickhardt, Summers, and Garrett as cited. The cited title ("Automated ct-based body composition analysis: Opportunistic prediction...") is also wrong; it conflates this paper with a different 2021 Korean J Radiol editorial by Pickhardt, Summers, and Garrett titled "Automated CT-Based Body Composition Analysis: A Golden Opportunity." The reference as cited has both a fabricated/mismatched title and wrong author list.
LINK: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/32780005/
